description:
Roll-up epic for the non-blocking-but-must-fix-before-a-public-launch gaps from the cold-context ship-readiness assessment (2026-06-22). These don't stop `mix hex.publish` from running, but shipping without them yields a messy/embarrassing first public release.

Independent of the hard-blockers epic (mutagen-y8o) except where noted — most can land in parallel.

## Children
- H1: `package: [files:]` whitelist (control what ships; exclude dev cruft)
- H2: fix `mix test --cover` (currently 3 failures + a crash)
- H3: reconcile README v1.0/v1.1 version labels with 0.1.0
- H4: fix or escalate baseline_red guard rail (relates mutagen-wrd.37)
- H5: GitHub Actions CI (mix test + mix test.integration)
- H6: README annotated JSON output example + user-facing CHANGELOG pass

comments.text:
ORCHESTRATION START (2026-06-22)
Epic worktree: /Users/mz/dev/mz/mutagen_ex-hcs (branch epic/hcs, base 196bb8c)
worker_mode: claude (user-selected)
generated_state_paths: none (.spec/state.json absent)
DAG: .2 .3 .4 .5 .6 ready; .1 blocked by external mutagen-y8o.1 (open) — deferred this run.
First wave (cap 3): .2, .4, .5. README tickets .3/.6 sequenced afterward to avoid README conflicts.

ORCHESTRATION PROGRESS (2026-06-22)
Landed into epic/hcs (smoke green throughout): .4 (baseline_red guard test + README), .3 (README version labels), .2 (mix test --cover clean; rebased over .4's test_helper.exs), .6 (README JSON example + CHANGELOG; 1 verify bounce on a phantom mutation.error field, fixed + merged).
BOUNCEs: 1 (.6 verify→implementer, factual). Scope expansions: 0.

REMAINING (orchestration paused — both need outside input):
- .5 GitHub CI: BLOCKED on a product decision. mix test.integration is red on main because archive_install_test fails — the .ez bundles only mutagen_ex's ebin, not the :telemetry runtime dep, so `mix mutagen` from an archive-installed host aborts (runtime_load_failed). Root: archives aren't meant to carry deps. Awaiting user call: drop archive.install (ship as dev dep) vs. make :telemetry optional/graceful.
- .1 package files whitelist: BLOCKED on external mutagen-y8o.1 (open, different epic) — out of this run's reach.

Follow-up candidates surfaced (not auto-carved, neither blocks a child): r11 /tmp-attribution flake (mutation_runner_test.exs:1181); project coverage ~79% < Mix default 90%.
Epic stays in_progress (phase:implementing). NOT pushing/PR-ing — that's the human checkpoint.

WORKTREE RENAME (2026-06-23): branch epic/hcs -> mutagen-hcs/hex-pm-publish-hygiene; worktree dir ../mutagen_ex-hcs -> ../mutagen_ex-hex-pm-publish-hygiene. Stage mutagen-hcs.5 merges back into this renamed branch.

Subticket mutagen-hcs.7 added (Option A, user-decided 2026-06-23): drop the producer-only telemetry hook API, rewire progress onto the runner's on_site_completed callback, remove :telemetry as a runtime dep → archive becomes dep-free and archive_install_test passes. Unblocks .5 (CI), which now depends on .7. Separately: .1 (package files) is now unblocked (mutagen-y8o.1 closed).

Subticket mutagen-hcs.8 added (ship-blocker, surfaced by .7 audit): {"abort_reason":"missing_scope","aborted":true,"baseline":null,"coverage":null,"details":{"message":"at least one --scope target is required"},"meta":{"elixir_version":"1.19.5","exunit_seed":0,"otp_version":"28","tool_version":"0.1.0"},"mutation":null,"scope":[],"tests":null,"truncated":false,"version":"1","warnings":[]} hard-crashes (Map.from_struct on a plain meta map at mutagen.ex) — confirmed PRE-EXISTING (reproduces at base, independent of .7). .7 approved on its declared scope (telemetry removal/archive/progress, double-verified); --stream carved to .8 + needs CLI integration coverage. Also noted: mutagen.ast spec.check verification command is stale (defp->def after wrd.25.2) — pre-existing, lower priority.

title: [EPIC] hex.pm publish — hygiene & correctness gaps
